pl.gov.gios.airquality.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for GIOŚ Poland Air Quality CloudEvents on the `gios-poland` topic keyed by `{station_id}`.

pl.gov.gios.airquality.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for gios-poland CloudEvents using the documented Unified Namespace topic hierarchy.

pl.gov.gios.airquality.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for gios-poland CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

pl.gov.gios.airquality.Station.name: Station
pl.gov.gios.airquality.Station.description: Reference data for a GIOŚ air quality monitoring station, including its geographic location, city, commune, district, and voivodeship.

pl.gov.gios.airquality.Sensor.name: Sensor
pl.gov.gios.airquality.Sensor.description: Reference data for a sensor (measurement point) installed at a GIOŚ station, identifying the pollutant it measures.

pl.gov.gios.airquality.Measurement.name: Measurement
pl.gov.gios.airquality.Measurement.description: Hourly air quality measurement from a single sensor, reporting the concentration of the monitored pollutant in µg/m³.

pl.gov.gios.airquality.AirQualityIndex.name: AirQualityIndex
pl.gov.gios.airquality.AirQualityIndex.description: Current Polish Air Quality Index for a station, including the overall index and sub-indices for individual pollutants (SO₂, NO₂, PM10, PM2.5, O₃).

pl.gov.gios.airquality.description: Events from GIOŚ Poland Air Quality covering Polish air-quality monitoring stations. Reference records identify stations, sites, or areas; measurement and forecast records carry the current source data.

pl.gov.gios.airquality.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of pl.gov.gios.airquality events with subscriber-friendly UNS topics.

pl.gov.gios.airquality.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 variant of pl.gov.gios.airquality events for generic brokers and Azure Service Bus.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

voivodeship.description: Routing attribute `voivodeship` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

pollutant.description: Routing attribute `pollutant` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

voivodeship.description: Routing attribute `voivodeship` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

pollutant.description: Routing attribute `pollutant` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

voivodeship.description: Routing attribute `voivodeship` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

station_id.description: Routing attribute `station_id` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

pollutant.description: Routing attribute `pollutant` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

voivodeship.description: Routing attribute `voivodeship` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

pollutant.description: Routing attribute `pollutant` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

schema.name: Station

station_id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the monitoring station assigned by GIOŚ. Mapped from the Polish field 'Identyfikator stacji'.

station_code.description: Short alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the station, e.g. 'DsLegAlRzecz'. Mapped from 'Kod stacji'.

name.description: Human-readable name of the monitoring station, typically including city and street. Mapped from 'Nazwa stacji'.

latitude.description: Latitude of the station in decimal degrees north (WGS84). Mapped from 'WGS84 φ N'.

longitude.description: Longitude of the station in decimal degrees east (WGS84). Mapped from 'WGS84 λ E'.

city_id.description: Numeric identifier of the city where the station is located. Mapped from 'Identyfikator miasta'.

city_name.description: Name of the city where the station is located. Mapped from 'Nazwa miasta'.

commune.description: Name of the commune (gmina) where the station is located. Mapped from 'Gmina'.

district.description: Name of the district (powiat) where the station is located. Mapped from 'Powiat'.

voivodeship.description: Name of the voivodeship (province) where the station is located, in uppercase Polish. Mapped from 'Województwo'.

street.description: Street address of the station, if available. Mapped from 'Ulica'.

schema.description: Reference data for a GIOŚ air quality monitoring station, including its geographic location, city, commune, district, and voivodeship.

schema.name: Sensor

sensor_id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the sensor (measurement point) assigned by GIOŚ. Mapped from 'Identyfikator stanowiska'.

station_id.description: Numeric identifier of the parent monitoring station. Mapped from 'Identyfikator stacji'.

parameter_name.description: Polish-language name of the measured pollutant, e.g. 'pył zawieszony PM10', 'dwutlenek azotu'. Mapped from 'Wskaźnik'.

parameter_formula.description: Chemical formula of the measured pollutant, e.g. 'PM10', 'NO2', 'SO2', 'O3', 'CO', 'C6H6', 'PM2.5'. Mapped from 'Wskaźnik - wzór'.

parameter_code.description: Short code identifying the pollutant parameter, e.g. 'PM10', 'NO2'. Mapped from 'Wskaźnik - kod'.

parameter_id.description: Numeric identifier of the pollutant parameter in the GIOŚ system. Mapped from 'Id wskaźnika'.

schema.description: Reference data for a sensor (measurement point) installed at a GIOŚ station, identifying the pollutant it measures.

schema.name: Measurement

station_id.description: Numeric identifier of the monitoring station that owns this sensor.

sensor_id.description: Numeric identifier of the sensor that produced this measurement.

sensor_code.description: Code identifying the sensor and its aggregation period, e.g. 'DsLegAlRzecz-NO2-1g'. Mapped from 'Kod stanowiska'.

timestamp.description: Measurement timestamp in local Polish time (ISO 8601 format). Mapped from 'Data'.

value.description: Measured pollutant concentration. Unit: micrograms per cubic meter (µg/m³). Null when the measurement is missing or invalid. Mapped from 'Wartość'.

schema.description: Hourly air quality measurement from a single sensor, reporting the concentration of the monitored pollutant in µg/m³.

schema.name: AirQualityIndex

station_id.description: Numeric identifier of the monitoring station. Mapped from 'Identyfikator stacji pomiarowej'.

calculation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the overall index was calculated (ISO 8601 in local Polish time). Mapped from 'Data wykonania obliczeń indeksu'.

index_value.description: Overall air quality index value: 0=Bardzo dobry (Very good), 1=Dobry (Good), 2=Umiarkowany (Moderate), 3=Dostateczny (Sufficient), 4=Zły (Bad), 5=Bardzo zły (Very bad). Mapped from 'Wartość indeksu'.

index_category.description: Polish-language category name of the overall index, e.g. 'Bardzo dobry', 'Dobry', 'Umiarkowany'. Mapped from 'Nazwa kategorii indeksu'.

source_data_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the source measurement data used for the overall index calculation. Mapped from 'Data danych źródłowych, z których policzono wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika st'.

so2_calculation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the SO₂ sub-index was calculated. Mapped from 'Data wykonania obliczeń indeksu dla wskaźnika SO2'.

so2_index_value.description: SO₂ sub-index value (0–5 scale). Mapped from 'Wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika SO2'.

so2_index_category.description: Polish-language category name for the SO₂ sub-index. Mapped from 'Nazwa kategorii indeksu dla wskażnika SO2'.

so2_source_data_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the source data used for the SO₂ sub-index. Mapped from 'Data danych źródłowych, z których policzono wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika SO2'.

no2_calculation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the NO₂ sub-index was calculated. Mapped from 'Data wykonania obliczeń indeksu dla wskaźnika NO2'.

no2_index_value.description: NO₂ sub-index value (0–5 scale). Mapped from 'Wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika NO2'.

no2_index_category.description: Polish-language category name for the NO₂ sub-index. Mapped from 'Nazwa kategorii indeksu dla wskażnika NO2'.

no2_source_data_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the source data used for the NO₂ sub-index. Mapped from 'Data danych źródłowych, z których policzono wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika NO2'.

pm10_calculation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the PM10 sub-index was calculated. Mapped from 'Data wykonania obliczeń indeksu dla wskaźnika PM10'.

pm10_index_value.description: PM10 sub-index value (0–5 scale). Mapped from 'Wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika PM10'.

pm10_index_category.description: Polish-language category name for the PM10 sub-index. Mapped from 'Nazwa kategorii indeksu dla wskażnika PM10'.

pm10_source_data_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the source data used for the PM10 sub-index. Mapped from 'Data danych źródłowych, z których policzono wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika PM10'.

pm25_calculation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the PM2.5 sub-index was calculated. Mapped from 'Data wykonania obliczeń indeksu dla wskaźnika PM2.5'.

pm25_index_value.description: PM2.5 sub-index value (0–5 scale). Mapped from 'Wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika PM2.5'.

pm25_index_category.description: Polish-language category name for the PM2.5 sub-index. Mapped from 'Nazwa kategorii indeksu dla wskażnika PM2.5'.

pm25_source_data_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the source data used for the PM2.5 sub-index. Mapped from 'Data danych źródłowych, z których policzono wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika PM2.5'.

o3_calculation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the O₃ sub-index was calculated. Mapped from 'Data wykonania obliczeń indeksu dla wskaźnika O3'.

o3_index_value.description: O₃ sub-index value (0–5 scale). Mapped from 'Wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika O3'.

o3_index_category.description: Polish-language category name for the O₃ sub-index. Mapped from 'Nazwa kategorii indeksu dla wskażnika O3'.

o3_source_data_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the source data used for the O₃ sub-index. Mapped from 'Data danych źródłowych, z których policzono wartość indeksu dla wskaźnika O3'.

overall_status.description: Whether the overall air quality index is currently valid for this station. Mapped from 'Status indeksu ogólnego dla stacji pomiarowej'.

critical_pollutant_code.description: Code of the pollutant that determined the overall index value, e.g. 'OZON', 'PM10'. Mapped from 'Kod zanieczyszczenia krytycznego'.

schema.description: Current Polish Air Quality Index for a station, including the overall index and sub-indices for individual pollutants (SO₂, NO₂, PM10, PM2.5, O₃).

description: GIOŚ Poland Air Quality publishes sensor readings and air-quality index values from Poland's Chief Inspectorate of Environmental Protection (GIOŚ) for Polish air-quality monitoring stations. These events help consumers build monitoring, alerting, analytics, and dashboards without polling the upstream API directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for GIOŚ Poland Air Quality, including upstream API context and bridge deployment notes.
